_captured_at_tag: @c.24.rc1 (merge commit 0fd0029) + C25 in-progress at feat/c25 tip 972f6ee

_host.note: local developer machine measurement. The CI baseline must be refreshed on the first green run of .github/workflows/binary_size.yml by running scripts/measure_binary_size.sh --refresh-baseline on a GitHub runner and committing the result. Local vs CI numbers can differ by ~5% for bytes and 2-10x for startup_ms due to filesystem / IO contention differences; the +10% budget is set large enough to absorb that noise across @c.25.rc7.

_policy: see docs/STABILITY.md §5.5 (performance is non-contractual) and .dev/C25_BLOCKERS.md::C25B-009. A +10% regression in any of bytes / text / startup_ms fails .github/workflows/binary_size.yml (continue-on-error: true during @c.25.rc7). Hard-fail promotion is a post-stable follow-up.
